'''dagatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leachtub|leachtub]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leachtub|leachtub]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dagatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dægæthæth|dægæthæth]] || [[word:dægæthæj|dægæthæj]] || [[word:dægæthæsh|dægæthæsh]] || [[word:dægæthæ|dægæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dagagathath|dagagathath]] || [[word:dagagathaj|dagagathaj]] || [[word:dagagathash|dagagathash]] || [[word:dagagatha|dagagatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dagathath|dagathath]] || [[word:dagathaj|dagathaj]] || [[word:dagathash|dagathash]] || [[word:dagatha|dagatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dagafthath|dagafthath]] || [[word:dagafthaj|dagafthaj]] || [[word:dagafthash|dagafthash]] || [[word:dagafthaf|dagafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dagathatha|dagathatha]] || [[word:dagathaja|dagathaja]] || [[word:dagathasha|dagathasha]] || [[word:dagathaka|dagathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dagathath|dagathath]] || [[word:dagathaj|dagathaj]] || [[word:dagathash|dagathash]] || [[word:dagatha|dagatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dagathathal|dagathathal]] || [[word:dagathajal|dagathajal]] || [[word:dagathashal|dagathashal]] || [[word:dagathakal|dagathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dagathathatha|dagathathatha]] || [[word:dagathajaja|dagathajaja]] || [[word:dagathashasha|dagathashasha]] || [[word:dagathaka|dagathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dagathathan|dagathathan]] || [[word:dagathajan|dagathajan]] || [[word:dagathashan|dagathashan]] || [[word:dagathakan|dagathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dagathathaoro|dagathathaoro]] || [[word:dagathajaoro|dagathajaoro]] || [[word:dagathashaoro|dagathashaoro]] || [[word:dagathakaoro|dagathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
